title: Resolution to Pay Prior Years Expenditures, in Particular Meralco Electric Bills, with a Total Amount of Fifty-seven Thousand Two Hundred Sixty Pesos and 078/100 (P 57,260.078) Chargeable Against the Current Appropriations for the Same Expense Item of the General Services Office. (AUTHOR:COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 04/01/2022)
